page_metadata.biotools__summary: KinOrtho is method for mapping human kinase orthologs across the tree of life and illuminating understudied kinases. It is a combination of full-length and domain-based orthology inference methods.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: KinOrtho is method for mapping human kinase orthologs across the tree of life and illuminating understudied kinases. It is a combination of full-length and domain-based orthology inference methods.
